subject: MCore --perdevice_refine 1 ignored?
body:
Hi,

I'm running something like this:

MCore \
--population m_run01/population_01.population \
--refine_imagewarp 4x6 \
--refine_particles \
--perdevice_refine 1 --devicelist 0 1 --cpu_memory 

Even with --perdevice_refine 1 I always get 3 processes on each GPU, which 
I believe leads to memory issues. Is this a bug and the --perdevice_refine 
1 is simply ignored?

This was with:

MCore 2.0.0+109c9f513cb2bb1976f92b5e20910f40a873282f
Copyright (C) 2024 MCore

All the best, Simon
